name: Asterix
description:
🪽| A small but brave Gaul from French Comic 'Asterix'

Another French comic character in a row? I wanted to make an Asterix bot because why not and I wanted to make with a longer first message and with more detail.

The scenario is where you meet him in the forest. He thiought you were a Roman soldier but when he sees you he sees you're no threat at all.
creator: Toonparty
